reviews.review_description:
For 0.99 $ many monster have good details.
Latest version is require vr gear controller I can not aim with headset help me pls.
For money enjoyable game   graphics quite good plenty to explore  also upgrades
Can you add gear controller support?

developer_response.body:
Hello, Motawa.
We've added Gear VR controller support in our last update. Try it out!

reviews.review_description: Some of these shots are impossible
this has all the good stuff, and no real bad... thx 4 the fixes and making a fun engaging game... awesome map phylosophy
Very enjoyable game graphics very good gameplay simple but fun ...can upgrade weapons as you progress. Seems there is 8 levels or more. Good price
This is a good game, something am all ways going in Circle and get stick

This is a good game for the money. I cant get the map to pop up, I tried pressing 'up' on the Oculus go controller pad.

EDIT: The developer released an update that sort out the issue of the missing map. Now i can concentrate on getting further than level 2.

So the game is interesting but pushing up on the trackpad does not work even after finding a rolled up parchment still nothing any helps devs? Thnx i have emailed them fingers crossed looks fun when i see it on youtube working lol.....UPDATE i took the time to email the dev instead of just flame the game he literally thanked me via email and he fixed it all in under 12 hours...support these devs please

developer_response.body: Thank you for your help and sorry about the issue. Have fun dungeon-crawling! :)

reviews.review_description: sorry....can't find the map in the game

developer_response.body:
Hi Makaimura!
Sorry about the issue. We just released an update that should fix this issue. Have fun!

reviews.review_description: ..but very simple. Controls works fine, graphics are kinda nice and Just the right price. A Stong 3 stars.

This game is repetitive but still I enjoyed playing it, until I got to level 7. The glitch prevented me from getting a treasure chest, the chest flew towards me then just stuck around my neck positon, when I looked down I no longer saw my health bar but the chest instead! It disappeared once I left the room, but there was also no new gun to unlock at entrance. Anyway I pushed on, then on level 8 new glitch appeared, I saw 2 dragon bosses! One was moving and attacking, the other just froze. I couldn't beat this boss due to lack of new weapon from previous level. So yeah, sorry for the long comment but PLEASE fix these glitches!!
